2026-05-26ISEDCompetition Tribunal ActReappointment of a member of the Competition TribunalRe-appointment of Binah Nathan of Mississauga, Ontario, as a member of the Competition Tribunal, to hold office during good behaviour for a term of four years.N/A
subject: Reappointment of a member of the Competition Tribunal
precis: Re-appointment of Binah Nathan of Mississauga, Ontario, as a member of the Competition Tribunal, to hold office during good behaviour for a term of four years.
